# Stageborne

Being part of a stageborne community means you excels at controlling how you are perceived, adapting your behavior, and maintaining a role under pressure.

## Features

**Perfect Act:** You have advantage on rolls to assume a role, maintain a persona, or control your expression under pressure.

> **Design notes:** I wanted to avoid something too Bard-esque, so instead I focused on the lived experience of performers, especially those in traveling troupes or circuses. The goal was to capture a lifestyle built around performance, adaptation, and constantly stepping into different roles, rather than just artistic skill.
